Home›About Us

Preserving India's Heritage,
One Piece at a Time

Sanskriti The Antique is India's most trusted marketplace for authentic antiques — connecting passionate sellers with discerning collectors since 2008.

Our story

A Legacy of Authenticity

What began as a small family antique shop in the lanes of Hazratganj, Lucknow has grown into India's largest verified antique marketplace. Founded by Ananya Baranwal in 2008, Sanskriti The Antique was built on a simple belief — that every authentic antique deserves to find the right home.

Today, we connect over 1,200 verified sellers with thousands of collectors, interior designers, and heritage enthusiasts across India and internationally. Every piece on our platform has been assessed for authenticity, ensuring buyers can trust what they purchase.

1,200+
Verified Sellers
5,000+
Authentic Pieces
15+
Years in Business
98%
Authenticity Rate
🏺
"Every antique carries the soul of its era. Our mission is to ensure these pieces of history find homes where they will be cherished for generations."
— Ananya Baranwal
Founder & CEO
Our journey

15 Years of Heritage

2008

Founded in Lucknow

Started as a small antique shop in Hazratganj, Lucknow by the Baranwal family.

2012

First Exhibition

Participated in the National Crafts Mela, Delhi — won recognition for authentic Mughal-era pieces.

2016

Digital Expansion

Launched our first online catalogue, connecting with buyers across India and internationally.

2019

Seller Network Launch

Opened the platform to verified sellers across India, building a community of 200+ antique dealers.

2022

Training Programme

Launched the Sanskriti Training Academy — professional education for antique sellers.

2024

1,200+ Sellers Strong

Grew to over 1,200 verified sellers with ₹50Cr+ in annual transactions through the platform.

The people behind it

Our Team

VA

Vikas Arya

Founder & CEO

Third-generation antique dealer with 20+ years in the Indian heritage market.

RK

Rajesh Kumar

Head of Authentication

Certified gemologist and antique appraiser with expertise in brass, bronze, and silver.

PS

Priya Sharma

Business Development

MBA with specialisation in luxury goods and heritage market strategy.

AN

Arjun Nair

Digital & Marketing

Digital marketing expert helping antique sellers build strong online presence.

What drives us

Our Mission & Values

🔍

Authenticity First

Every piece is assessed. We never compromise on the integrity of what we list.

🌱

Heritage Preservation

We believe India's cultural history deserves to be preserved and celebrated.

🤝

Seller Success

Our sellers' growth is our growth. We invest deeply in their education and tools.

🌍

Global Reach

Connecting Indian heritage with collectors and enthusiasts around the world.
